source_note: Order No. 90847 (Order on Appeals) on The Potomac Edison Company's application for adjustments to its retail electric distribution rates, Maryland PSC Case No. 9695, issued October 18, 2023. Listed for reference (metadata-only). PDF on the Maryland PSC host psc.maryland.gov/wp-content/uploads/; case jacket in the PSC DMS case-search (case 9695).

findings.title: Disallowance: $31,435,485
findings.summary: ly 18, 19, 20, 21 and 28, 2023. The PULJ issued a Proposed Order on September 6, 2023,1 authorizing $31,435,485 of the Company’s request, and denying approval of the remaining request.
